text: The hush of concentration from the room behind glass fills me with a sense of distance and observation—am I an outsider looking in, or a future participant meditating outside the present flow? The bright, inviting museum display in the next space calls me to curiosity and wonder; the colorful design and talk of research and development stir a hope for progress, the pursuit of knowledge humming in the air. I feel both disconnected and inspired, as if caught between the worlds of contemplation and creativity.
